reviews.comment:
Es caro, para consumir algo de paso. Es aceptable la atencion y el lugar en si.

reviews.comment:
Entre distancias largas sin pueblos, esta estación te resuelve necesidad combustible y compras. Baños súper limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Located far from towns, this station meets your fuel and shopping needs. The restrooms are spotless.

reviews.comment:
Todo muy bien atención y servicios

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great, the service and attention were excellent.

reviews.comment:
De tres baños, 2 clausurados y el de discapacitados tapado de papeles y sin agua. Despues de kilómetros y kilómetros es la única estación de servicio y no tiene los servicios esenciales👎

(Translated by Google)
Of the three restrooms, two are closed, and the accessible one is clogged with paper and has no water. After miles and miles, it's the only gas station, and it doesn't even have basic services. 👎
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pabVMwUk1abVl5VVV0eGRubEJNbkJyVDFnMVVYYxAB

reviews.comment:
LOS PLAYEROS DE JODA Y LA ESTACIÓN DE SERVICIO UN KILOMBO..
NO PAREN !!!!!
SIGAN DE LARGO. !!!!

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are a party and the gas station is a mess... Don't stop!!!!! Keep going!!!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w5Q2VUbDFkVFpEWXpGQ1VUZFBZWEU1VG1GTlMzYxAB

reviews.comment:
En época de verano poco personal y largas filas me ha pasado en varias oportunidades baños carentes de limpieza

(Translated by Google)
During the summer season, there is a lack of staff and long lines; on several occasions, I have experienced unclean restrooms.

Almost a must-see stop, good parking lot, very busy

reviews.comment:
Buena atención , pero considerando que es un punto estratégico de la ruta 3 , podría estar mejor atendida el sector de minimercado , muy poco personal  y se hace muyyyy lento .
Y falta mucha limpieza a los baños

(Translated by Google)
The service was good, but considering it's a strategic point on Route 3, the convenience store area could be better staffed; there's very little personnel and it's extremely slow.
And the restrooms really need cleaning.

reviews.comment:
En medio de la nada, exhausto, no te permiten acampar! Te despiertan a cualquier hora y te hacen irte con tu carpa. INHUMANOS TOTALES.

(Translated by Google)
In the middle of nowhere, exhausted, they won't let you camp! They wake you up at all hours and make you leave with your tent. Utterly inhuman.
